title: Mommy
tmdbOverview: A peculiar neighbor offers hope to a recent widow who is struggling to raise a teenager who is unpredictable and, sometimes, violent.
synopsis: Mommy (2014) is a drama film in French. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.0 on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
